bertscore.original_cuda_error:
CUDA error: no kernel image is available for execution on the device
Search for `cudaErrorNoKernelImageForDevice' in https://docs.nvidia.com/cuda/cuda-runtime-api/group__CUDART__TYPES.html for more information.
CUDA kernel errors might be asynchronously reported at some other API call, so the stacktrace below might be incorrect.
For debugging consider passing CUDA_LAUNCH_BLOCKING=1
Compile with `TORCH_USE_CUDA_DSA` to enable device-side assertions.

per_entity_results.generated: Network Latency and L2 Forwarding Performance Tests with Variable Packet Rates and Sizes on nida and cesis Nodes
per_entity_results.reference: MoonGen Load Latency Benchmarks

per_entity_results.generated: This dataset captures Layer 2 network latency and forwarding performance measurements under varying packet rates and sizes, using Moongen-based load generation and Lua-driven workload execution. The experiment evaluates hardware response times, energy consumption, and synchronization accuracy across six runs per configuration. Setup scripts ensure consistent environments for testing, while looped commands generate traffic, capture latency histograms, and produce synchronized timing logs. Results include CSV and PNG files for analyzing throughput, latency distributions, and power metrics under different workload conditions.
per_entity_results.reference: This experiment measures l2-load-latency in a two-node setup with MoonGen on one node as the load generator and libmoon on another node as the forwarding device under test. The benchmark tests different packet rates and packet sizes. Each measurement runs for fixed duration, records energy consumption on both machines, and stores latency histograms as CSV data and PNG plots for every parameter combination.

per_entity_results.generated: The artifact contains latency measurements and their frequencies recorded during a network load test, enabling analysis of packet transmission delays under specified packet rate and size conditions.
per_entity_results.reference: Uploaded latency histogram CSV for one benchmark iteration containing the latency-distribution data produced for the selected packet-rate and packet-size combination.

per_entity_results.generated: The artifact contains a histogram visualizing the distribution of packet latencies measured during a network load test, generated to assess performance under specified traffic rate and packet size conditions.
per_entity_results.reference: Uploaded latency histogram plot for one benchmark iteration of the MoonGen L2 load-latency experiment. It visualizes the filtered latency distribution for the selected packet-rate and packet-size combination.

per_entity_results.generated: This script automates environment configuration for a performance-critical software component, installing build dependencies, cloning a version-controlled repository, and applying system-level settings to disable CPU turbo boost and enable huge pages. It prepares a consistent execution environment for subsequent workload testing or measurement capture.
per_entity_results.reference: Prepares the DUT node by building libmoon and enabling hugepage support. It also disables CPU turbo boost for more stable forwarding measurements.

per_entity_results.generated: This script configures a system for network load generation by installing dependencies, cloning a load generation framework, building its components, and setting up memory resources. It establishes the infrastructure required to execute high-throughput network stress tests. The setup ensures synchronization between host configuration and workload execution parameters. No measurement capture or result processing is performed directly by this script.
per_entity_results.reference: Prepares the load-generator node by building MoonGen from the provided repository and branch. Additionally, it enables hugepage support for packet generation and latency measurements.

per_entity_results.generated: File copy from /home/warmuth/experiments/experiments/loop-experiment-llm/evaluation/plot_latency.py to MoonGen/plot_latency.py on node cesis.
per_entity_results.reference: File copy from /home/warmuth/experiments/experiments/loop-experiment-llm/evaluation/plot_latency.py to MoonGen/plot_latency.py on node cesis.

per_entity_results.generated: Runs L2 load latency test at 100 Mbps with 64-byte packets, outputting latency histograms to CSV.
per_entity_results.reference: Runs MoonGen's l2-load-latency example using the selected transmit and receive ports and histogram output paths.

per_entity_results.generated: This script generates Layer 2 network traffic to measure latency under variable packet rates and sizes, synchronizing with remote nodes to ensure coordinated testing. It captures latency histograms, energy consumption data, and uploads resulting CSV and PNG files for analysis. The workload includes controlled traffic generation, measurement period synchronization, and post-test data visualization.
per_entity_results.reference: Looped benchmark that iterates over all configured packet-rate and packet-size combinations, synchronizes with the DUT, records node energy usage and runs MoonGen's l2-load-latency example. Afterwards it uploads the generated latency histogram and plot.

per_entity_results.generated: The script executes a network latency benchmark by varying packet transmission rate and size, generating traffic through a load generator to measure end-to-end latency under different load conditions. Each iteration records latency histograms for analysis of performance characteristics.
per_entity_results.reference: Each iteration runs the MoonGen l2-load-latency script with different values for packet rate and packet size, storing the measured latencies in a CSV file, generating a plot, and uploading both artifacts after each run.

per_entity_results.generated: The command runs a Layer 2 forwarding test with two interfaces to measure latency under load.
per_entity_results.reference: Runs libmoon's l2-forward example so the DUT forwards traffic during the load-generator measurement window.

per_entity_results.generated: This script executes an L2 forwarding latency test under variable packet rate and size conditions, synchronizing hardware and capturing energy consumption metrics. It runs a Lua-based workload on a remote device, measuring performance during data transmission between specified ports. Results include synchronized timing logs and energy measurement files for analysis.
per_entity_results.reference: Forwarder that synchronizes with the load-generator node, records energy usage and forwards the received packets back to the load-generator node.

per_entity_results.generated: Each iteration executes a Layer 2 forwarding benchmark with configured packet rate and size, measuring latency and energy consumption during data plane operations. The test evaluates performance under varying traffic loads by adjusting transmission parameters, capturing per-run metrics for analysis.
per_entity_results.reference: Each iteration runs the libmoon l2-forward script to forward the received packets from the loadgen node.

per_entity_results.generated: Runs L2 load latency test at 100 Mbps with 64-byte packets, outputting latency histograms to CSV.
per_entity_results.reference: Runs MoonGen's l2-load-latency example using the selected transmit and receive ports and histogram output paths.
